name: Freshsales
description: Monitor Freshsales CRM user access and role-based access controls for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Freshsales at https://your-domain.myfreshworks.com/crm/sales
2. Click your profile picture and select Profile Settings
3. Click the API Settings tab
4. Copy your API key
5. Find your Bundle alias (domain) below the API key
6. Enter both values below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Freshsales Profile Settings > API Settings

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Freshsales CRM users/owners and reports their active status for access review

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies Freshsales CRM user access controls by reviewing user assignments and availability
